summary: Code logic is sound with strong typing and clear error handling, but deliverable is incomplete. Critical missing files: aggregator.test.ts (referenced in workflow step 'Run aggregator unit tests'), package.json, and tsconfig.json. Harness.ts line 37 copies these files assuming they exist in ROOT, causing setup failure. Workflow will not run via act without them. Regex-based XML parser (aggregator.ts lines 48-60) is acceptable but fragile on edge cases. No actionlint validation evidence. Type safety is good throughout; CLI output format (lines 23-27) tightly couples to harness assertions (harness.ts lines 95-100), risking maintenance issues. Temp cleanup proper in harness (line 86). Design is correct but execution incomplete.
